info.title: Ecomapp Main-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp Main-buildTime API provides a comprehensive set of endpoints to manage e-commerce transactions, products, and user interactions.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including retrieval, creation, update, and deletion of products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints to manage customer orders, including order creation, status updates, and history.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management, authentication, and authorization related endpoints.

get.summary: Retrieve the cart contents for a user
get.description: Fetch the current shopping cart for the specified user by their unique identifier. Returns the list of items the user has added to their cart along with quantities and other relevant details.

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or malformed.

details.issue: userId must be a valid UUID or string identifier

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to a user's cart
post.description: Add a specified item to the shopping cart for the given user. The request body must include details of the item such as product ID, quantity, and any attributes. Returns the updated cart contents after the addition.

requestBody.description: Item to add to user's cart

example.message: The cart item details provided are invalid.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Creates a new order for the specified user using their current cart or order details. Initiates the order processing workflow and returns confirmation with order details.

400.description: Invalid userId or order data supplied

example.message: The order request is invalid due to incorrect or missing data.

details.issue: UserId does not exist or is malformed

404.description: User or cart not found for placing order

example.message: No user or cart found for the specified userId to place order.

details.issue: User or cart does not exist in the database

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Get details of an existing order identified by the orderId. Returns comprehensive information including order status, items, pricing, and customer details.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid or malformed.

details.issue: orderId must be a valid string identifier

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId.

details.issue: Order ID does not exist in the system

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Initiate a payment using provided payment details. Accepts payment method, amount, and user information in the request body. Returns a payment processing response including status or next steps.

example.message: The payment request data contains invalid or missing fields.

details.issue: Card number is invalid or missing

example.message: Payment was declined or could not be processed.

details.issue: Payment method was declined by the provider

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Endpoint to receive and process asynchronous webhook notifications from the payment gateway. Accepts JSON payloads representing payment events and updates the system accordingly. Returns a confirmation response upon successful handling.

requestBody.description: Payload representing the payment webhook event

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields

details.issue: Amount must be a positive number

402.description: Payment required or related issue detected

example.message: The payment status requires user intervention

details.issue: Payment status is pending and requires completion

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the product catalog with detailed attributes like name, description, price, and inventory details. The request body must follow the product schema. Successful creation returns the created product data.

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

example.message: Product data is incomplete or invalid

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same SKU already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve shipping tracking details for an order
get.description: Fetches the latest shipment tracking status and details for the specified order ID. Returns tracking information such as current location, estimated delivery date, and shipping carrier details.

example.message: No shipping information found for the specified order ID

details.issue: Order ID does not exist or has no tracking data

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with provided personal information like name, email, and password. The request body must adhere to the user_request schema. On success, returns user profile details.

example.message: User registration data is incomplete or invalid
A user with the given email or username already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: The currency code in ISO 4217 format for the item's prices.

discount.description: The discount amount applied to the item.

finalPrice.description: The final price of the item after discounts.

price.description: The original price of the item before any discounts.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

currency.description: The currency code in ISO 4217 format for the cart totals.

items.description: List of items currently in the shopping cart.

totalAmount.description: The total price of all items before any discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the entire cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user owning the cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to the order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the order item after discounts.

price.description: Original price of the order item before discounts.

productId.description: Unique identifier for the product in the order.

productName.description: Name of the product in the order.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product ordered.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created in ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: Currency code in ISO 4217 used for the order prices.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable for the order after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Current status of the order processing.

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: Total amount to be paid in the specified currency

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for the payment

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with this payment

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway processing this payment

paymentMethod.description: Method of payment selected by the customer

amount.description: Amount that was processed in the payment

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created, in ISO 8601 format

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code used for the payment

orderId.description: Identifier of the order associated with this payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier assigned to this payment by the system

paymentMethod.description: Method used for making the payment

transactionId.description: Identifier for the transaction in the payment gateway

gatewayResponse.description: Raw response message from the payment gateway

paymentId.description: Identifier of the payment associated with this webhook event

status.description: Updated status of the payment as notified by the gateway

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway

category.description: Category under which the product is classified

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the product price

description.example: A high-quality electronic gadget with multiple features.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

stock.description: Number of units available in stock

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase.

brand.description: The brand name of the product.

category.description: The category to which the product belongs.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created in the system in ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: Currency code of the product price, in ISO 4217 format.

description.example: A high-quality 4K Ultra HD television with smart features.

name.description: Name or title of the product.

price.description: Price of the product expressed in the specified currency.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product, from 0 to 5.

stock.description: Number of items currently available in stock.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product data was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the shipment.

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date in ISO 8601 format.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking information was last updated.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked.

trackingId.description: Unique tracking number provided by the courier.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active.

country.description: Country of the user, represented by the full country name.

phone.description: User's phone number including country code.

preferredCurrency.description: Preferred currency code for transactions, in ISO 4217 format.

userType.description: Type or role of the user within the system.

active.description: Specifies whether the user account is active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created, in ISO 8601 format.

email.description: Email address associated with the user.

preferredCurrency.description: Preferred currency code for this user's transactions.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user's data.

userType.description: Role or type of the user inside the system.

message.description: Detailed error message explaining what went wrong

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the error occurred

path.description: API endpoint path that caused the error

details.description: List of detailed validation issues or errors

field.description: Field name that caused the issue

issue.example: Must be a valid email address

message.description: Detailed error message explaining what went wrong

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the error occurred
